name: @tank/sublime-package-dev
description:
Create, develop, test, and publish Sublime Text packages. Full lifecycle: Python plugin API (commands, events, views), package structure, syntax definitions (.sublime-syntax), color schemes, themes, snippets, completions, build systems, publishing to Package Control.

Triggers: "sublime package", "sublime plugin", "sublime-syntax", "color scheme", "sublime theme", "package control", "TextCommand", "WindowCommand", "EventListener", "sublime API", "sublime snippet", "scope naming"
